# Jams

> Small applications, one-day experiments — each a standalone page, no frameworks, no ceremonies. Built to understand tools and approaches directly.

Each jam is a self-contained HTML/JS application deployed as a subdirectory. The focus is on direct, almost brutal simplicity: one file, one idea, one session.

## Applications

- [index](index.html): Landing page listing all jams

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, and review.

*[Leer en español](https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/)*
